title: Converting SQL Server code to PostgreSQL
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using Gemini, an AI assistant, to convert SQL Server T-SQL code to PostgreSQL. The tool helps developers migrate database schemas and explains PostgreSQL concepts to improve their skills in the process.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech shows how Gemini converts SQL Server T-SQL code into PostgreSQL, applying AI code generation to database migration. The demonstration covers migrating database schemas and explaining PostgreSQL concepts as part of the conversion. The takeaway: the assistant handles the schema translation and also teaches the underlying PostgreSQL details, building developer skills during the migration.
